Maria Lobillo
Home Blog About

Hi there 👋

Senior Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Expert in JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and React.js.

🛠️ I've spent the last few years shipping production-ready code across the stack, working closely with product and design teams. Currently focused on backend architecture, event-driven systems, and building platforms that scale.

One key achievement: re-architected an event-driven service using Redis and RabbitMQ for one of the largest iGaming platforms (10,000+ daily users), achieving 99.999% availability in line with SLA targets.

"Code should tell a story."

💻 Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python

🔧 Stack: Node.js, React, Next.js, NestJS, Expressjs

☁️ Cloud & Tools: AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Git

🏗️ Focus: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, DDD, Clean Code

📊 Methodologies: Agile, SCRUM, TDD
